\tzpentry{ID4539}{Xi Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4539 introduces Xi Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Xi_{\text{cym}} = \int_{\ManifoldL} \rho(r,t) \cdot \hat{O}_{\text{acoustic}}[\omega, \mathbf{k}, t] \, d^3r \implies \delta \ManifoldL \propto \nabla \cdot \mathbf{S} \end{equation}
